name: fairyteller_text
description: Generates the first chapter with Gemini, writes text.json, exposes the first-chapter preview, and starts visuals asynchronously.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { status: "chapter_1_ready", stage: "text", progress: 35, message: "Первая глава готова, готовим иллюстрацию", preview: $("Normalize First Chapter").item.json.text.preview } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Normalize First Chapter').first().json;
return [{ json: payload }];
